Maintenance-only as of v0.10.0 -- the screen-control (Neruva Computer) and code-editing (Neruva Code) agents were retired in the 2026-05-18 substrate-first pivot and archived to _attic/. The daemon still binds to 127.0.0.1:7331 with auth-token gating for users who want to host a local control plane for custom agents on the substrate.
